title: Items from Lololoshka seasons
description: This resource pack adds items from different seasons of the YouTuber Lololoshka by means of renaming
body:
Read the file inside the archive "ReadMe.txt"

This resource pack adds items from different seasons of the YouTuber Lololoshka by means of renaming, this resource pack may be useful for you to create your own map on the theme of the seasons of Lololoshka or just to hang out with Raya-Prime and get beautiful weapons

Use for fabric CIT Resewn, for forge CIT Reforged or Optifine
